mapper.select: SELECT status FROM monitoring_alert_dismissal WHERE alert_key = #{alertKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring_alert_dismissal (alert_key, status, operator_id, operator_name, dismissed_at) VALUES (#{alertKey}, #{status}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (alert_key) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, operator_id = EXCLUDED.operator_id, operator_name = EXCLUDED.operator_name, dismissed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
